# Publications {.unnumbered}

## Published papers {.unnumbered .unlisted}

JOURNAL
: Full reference of the paper.

## Papers under review {.unnumbered .unlisted}

```{=latex}
\cleardoublepage
\phantomsection
\addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{Table of Contents}
\tableofcontents

\cleardoublepage
\listoffigures

\cleardoublepage
\listoftables

% Body matter
\cleardoublepage
\pagenumbering{arabic}
\setcounter{page}{1}
\pagestyle{maincontentstyle}
```
